Revisitng The Clan

Sun Mar 22 2026 20:00:00 GMT-0400 (Eastern Daylight Time)

I revisted Warriors because I remembered Gaia saying her first childhood crush was Crowfeather. Surprised and delighted me at the same time. It was difficult to get through because I don't care for Brambleclaw or Squirrelpaw, and it's hard to be invested in the story when Firestar's not in it.

The day she said that was also Sophie's birthday when she got tummysick after we had mala, probably because she put some of the raw ingredients in her pocket and ate them uncooked. And James was off to the side drinking peanut butter soup.

The Oscar-nominated live action shorts told me I have a lot to learn about this world. Cruel world.
